mechanism: Current suppressed FX vol places markets in the low-vol regime where rate differentials explain 8-12% of FX variance. When FX vol rises, rate-FX explanatory power collapses to 0-2%. The vol level determines which regime the relationship operates in.
regime_dependence: Strongest in low-vol regimes (FX implied vol <25th percentile); breaks down when FX vol spikes above transition threshold
